description_long: This object is a rectangular stone funerary stele set within a brickwork frame, featuring a high-relief bust of a male figure in classical attire. The figure is depicted with a draped garment, and his right arm is bent across his chest, holding a scroll or similar object. Below the bust, there is a large inscribed panel with several lines of text, likely in Latin or Greek, though some portions are worn or damaged. The sides of the stele are adorned with carved motifs: one side displays a circular medallion, while the other features a detailed urn or amphora in relief. The top of the stele is arched, with some chipping and weathering visible, and the entire piece is mounted on a simple stone plinth. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or memorial function, typical of ancient Roman or Hellenistic grave markers.
description: A rectangular stone funerary stele with a high-relief bust, inscribed panel, and side carvings, set within a brickwork frame. Features classical attire, an arched top, and decorative motifs on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-relief bust of a male figure, inscribed panel, and arched top within a brickwork frame.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing a circular medallion motif carved in relief and the thickness of the stone slab.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the stele, with the bust's reverse and the inscribed panel visible, but less detailed.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying a detailed urn or amphora motif in relief and the slab's depth.
attribute_inscription: There is a large inscribed panel below the bust on the front face, featuring several lines of text in a classical script, likely Latin or Greek. The inscription is partially worn and some characters are difficult to read.
attribute_ornamentation: Ornamentation includes a high-relief bust of a male figure on the front, a circular medallion motif on the left side, and a detailed urn or amphora motif on the right side. The top is arched with some decorative stonework.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple rectangular stone plinth, slightly projecting from the main slab, with no visible decorative features or steps.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is arched, with some chipping and weathering, and features a recessed archway framing the bust. No additional decorative elements are present at the tip.
attribute_surrounding_features: The stele is set within a brickwork frame that surrounds the main stone slab on all sides. No other surrounding features are visible.
